title: Bitou Women's Day celebration unites community in style
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Energy, empowerment and entertainment lit up the New Horizons Sports Stadium as the Bitou Municipality hosted its highly anticipated Women's Day celebration over the past weekend.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Energy, empowerment and entertainment lit up the New Horizons Sports Stadium as the Bitou Municipality hosted its highly anticipated Women's Day celebration over the past weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With a powerful blend of local flair and national talent, the event brought the community together to honour the vital role women play in society."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the highlights of the day was the performance by Ashley Williams, a local artist who represented his roots and proved he could hold his own among South Africa's best.","html":"One of the highlights of the day was the performance by Ashley Williams, a local artist who represented his roots and proved he could hold his own among South Africa's best."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He shared the stage with music heavy-weights such as Junior King - famous for his anthem Hou gou my shot da - and Kayla Medusa.","html":"He shared the stage with music heavy-weights such as Junior King - famous for his anthem Hou gou my shot da - and Kayla Medusa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The crowd was further wowed by a powerful set from celebrated female vocalist Zintle Kwaaiman.","html":"The crowd was further wowed by a powerful set from celebrated female vocalist Zintle Kwaaiman."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event drew a large and lively crowd, with attendees of all ages enjoying a day filled with music and celebration.","html":"The event drew a large and lively crowd, with attendees of all ages enjoying a day filled with music and celebration."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The stage production was executed by Irock Trading from Gqeberha (PE), ensuring a world-class experience for both performers and audience.","html":"The stage production was executed by Irock Trading from Gqeberha (PE), ensuring a world-class experience for both performers and audience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ashley Williams","html":"Ashley Williams"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Organisers praised the day's success, describing it as a celebration not only of women, but of community pride and local talent."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This event reminded us of the strength and beauty of our women, and the power of coming together as a community,\" said one of the co-ordinators.","html":"\"This event reminded us of the strength and beauty of our women, and the power of coming together as a community,\" said one of the co-ordinators."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
